user_query:
Please read input/brief.md and input/current_content_inventory.csv and produce a complete SEO research package for our business based on that information. Create all outputs exactly as specified below under output/.

1) Seed keywords (20 total)
- Generate 20 seed keywords spanning informational, commercial, comparison, and local intents for our niche and location.
- Include estimated monthly searches and competition level for each.
- Save as CSV at output/seed_keywords.csv with EXACT header row:
  keyword,intent,estimated monthly searches,competition level
- Requirements:
  - At least 20 rows (excluding header)
  - At least 3 local-intent keywords include either the city name or "near me"

2) Keyword prioritization matrix (at least 15)
- Score a minimum of 15 target keywords with monthly volume, difficulty (1-10), business value (High/Med/Low), and a numeric priority score.
- Use a sensible scoring that favors high volume, low difficulty, and high business value.
- Save as CSV at output/keyword_prioritization.csv with EXACT header row:
  Keyword,Monthly Volume,Difficulty (1-10),Business Value,Priority Score
- Requirements:
  - At least 15 rows (excluding header)
  - Difficulty values must be integers 1-10
  - Business Value must be one of High, Med, or Low
  - Priority Score must be numeric and > 0
  - At least one of the top 3 by Priority Score must have Difficulty (1-10) <= 6 and Business Value = High

3) Competitor content gap analysis (structured JSON)
- Compare the competitors listed in input/brief.md against our current content inventory in input/current_content_inventory.csv.
- For each competitor: list top ranking keywords, content gaps (topics they rank for that we haven’t covered), any items we already cover that they don’t, and their weak spots.
- Save as JSON at output/competitor_gap.json with this top-level structure:
  {
    "competitors": [
      {
        "name": "...",
        "top_ranking_keywords": ["..."],
        "content_gap_topics": ["..."],
        "our_advantages": ["..."],
        "weak_spots": ["..."]
      }
    ]
  }
- Requirements:
  - Include every competitor from input/brief.md (no extras, no omissions)
  - Each competitor must have at least 5 top_ranking_keywords, 5 content_gap_topics, and 3 weak_spots

4) 12-month content roadmap (phased plan)
- Build a 12-month plan aligned to: Months 1-3 Foundation, Months 4-6 Authority Building, Months 7-12 Competitive Keywords.
- Include at least 2 items per month.
- Save as CSV at output/content_roadmap.csv with EXACT header row:
  Month,Theme,Content Type,Working Title,Target Keywords,Notes
- Requirements:
  - Month must be integers 1-12
  - Theme must be exactly one of Foundation (months 1-3), Authority Building (months 4-6), Competitive Keywords (months 7-12)
  - At least 24 total rows (excluding header)

5) On-page SEO checklist
- Provide a reusable checklist covering title tags, meta descriptions, content structure, technical basics — as described in the brief.
- Save as Markdown at output/onpage_checklist.md
- Requirements:
  - Must include the headings: Title Tag, Meta Description, Content Structure, Technical Basics
  - Under each heading include at least 3 checkbox items ("- [ ] ...")
  - Mention target keyword placement best practices and a keyword density guideline of 1-2%

6) Local SEO strategy
- Create a local SEO plan tailored to the specified location in input/brief.md.
- Save as Markdown at output/local_seo_strategy.md
- Requirements:
  - Include the headings: Google Business Profile Optimization and Local Citation Building
  - Mention the specified city/location by name at least once and include at least 5 actions per section

7) Monthly tracking template
- Provide a simple template to track monthly SEO performance.
- Save as CSV at output/monthly_tracking_template.csv with EXACT header row:
  PERIOD,TOP 5 RANKING KEYWORDS,NEW KEYWORDS RANKING,ORGANIC TRAFFIC,TOP PERFORMING PAGES,NEXT MONTH FOCUS
- Requirements:
  - Header row only is acceptable (no data rows required)

8) Deliverables summary
- Create a JSON summary with counts to help QA:
  {
    "number_of_seed_keywords": <int>,
    "number_of_prioritized_keywords": <int>,
    "number_of_competitors": <int>,
    "number_of_roadmap_items": <int>
  }
- Save at output/deliverables.json
- Ensure the counts match the files you produced.

Notes:
- Use only relative paths provided here.
- All CSVs must be UTF-8, comma-separated, and include header rows exactly as specified.
- Tailor keywords, gaps, and roadmap to the niche, services, and audience given in input/brief.md.
- Where location applies, use appropriate city-based phrases and variations like "near me" when relevant.
